response.justification: Candidate has well over the required 6 years of full-stack experience, with recent hands-on work in TypeScript/Node.js and AI-agent infrastructure (MCP code generators) that directly matches the role. Demonstrated breadth across frontend (React, Ember), backend (Node.js, GraphQL), databases (MongoDB, MySQL, SQL), cloud (AWS CDK), and containerization (Docker, Kubernetes), plus strong engineering discipline (TDD, pairing, CI/CD, trunk-based development). Gaps exist around Nest.js, Vitest, and recent Kotlin/Java work, but the foundational skills and adaptability strongly suggest these are learnable.
strengths: 13+ years full-stack experience with recent TypeScript/Node.js/React and AI-agent/MCP work
Strong software craftsmanship: TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based development, code katas, teaching
Broad polyglot background (TS, Java, C/C++, DLang, Python-adjacent) with cloud (AWS) and Kubernetes exposure
concerns: No explicit Nest.js or Vitest experience listed in primary stack
Kotlin/Java experience appears dated (pre-2018) rather than recent
Limited evidence of large-scale system architecture ownership at senior-staff level in primary stack
